mapper.delete: DELETE FROM VX_Moment_friendCircle WHERE create_time > CONVERT(varchar(45), GETDATE()-1, 23)
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_Moment_friendCircle (moment_id, creator, create_time, create_type, createtime, content) VALUES
(#{item.momentId}, #{item.creator}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.createType}, GETDATE(), #{item.content})
mapper.select: SELECT moment_id AS momentId, creator, create_type AS createType, content, CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(create_time) = 1 AND LEN(create_time) = 10 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), DATEADD(SECOND, CAST(create_time AS BIGINT), '1970-01-01'), 120) ELSE create_time END AS createTime FROM VX_Moment_friendCircle WHERE creator = #{creator} ORDER BY create_time DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM VX_Moment_friendCircle WHERE creator = #{creator}

SELECT m.moment_id AS momentId, m.creator, d.name AS creatorName, m.create_type AS createType, m.content, CASE WHEN ISNUMERIC(m.create_time) = 1 AND LEN(m.create_time) = 10 THEN CONVERT(VARCHAR(19), DATEADD(SECOND, CAST(m.create_time AS BIGINT), '1970-01-01'), 120) ELSE m.create_time END AS createTime FROM VX_Moment_friendCircle m LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentMembersList d ON m.creator = d.userid
AND d.name LIKE '%' + #{creatorName} + '%'
ORDER BY m.create_time DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{pageSize} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM VX_Moment_friendCircle m LEFT JOIN VX_DepartmentMembersList d ON m.creator = d.userid
AND d.name LIKE '%' + #{creatorName} + '%'
